title: National Sports Council (Registration of Sports Associations) (Forms and Fees) Regulations, 1971
title_en: National Sports Council (Registration of Sports Associations) (Forms and Fees) Regulations, 1971

provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the National Sports Council (Registration of Sports Associations) (Forms and Fees) Regulations.

In these Regulations, unless the context require otherwise— " the Act " means the National Sports Council of Tanzania Act 1 ; 1 Cap. 49 " prescribed " means, in relation to forms, forms prescribed in the First Schedule to these Regulations, and in relation to fees, fees prescribed in the Second Schedule to these Regulations.
Every application for the registration of a sports association shall be in the form prescribed in Form A, and be accompanied by a statement of particulars in the form prescribed in Form B.
Every application for exemption from registration shall be made to the Registrar in writing and shall be accompanied by the prescribed fee.

(1) Every certificate of exemption issued by the Registrar shall be in the form prescribed in Form C. (2) Every certificate of registration issued by the Registrar shall be in the form prescribed in Form D.

(1) No application for registration of a sports association shall be considered by the Registrar unless the appropriate fee has been paid in respect thereof. (2) The Minister may in any case remit in full or in part the prescribed fee where he considers it reasonable so to do. (3) Where there is any dispute as to what the appropriate prescribed fee is in respect of any application, the matter shall be referred to the Minister whose decision therein shall be final. First Schedule (Regulation 2) Forms [Editorial note: The forms have not been reproduced.] Second Schedule (Regulation 2) Fees [Fees omitted: Subject to variation. Items for which fees may be levied are listed below.] (a) On application for registration of a sports association which has branches in or members from two or more districts, for every sport, whether indoor or outdoor, provided for by the association. (b) On application for registration of a sports association which operates or has members from only one district, for every sport, whether indoor or outdoor, provided for by the association. (c) On application for exemption from registration under the Act, whether or not the association operates in, or has members from, two or more districts. (d) On issue of certificate of registration or for every copy of certificate.
